transcript: It's time to step up your PB&J game, and this is how to do it. Take two slices of your favorite bread, I'm using baguette. Spread some nut butter on it, I chose almond. Add your jelly, I'm using peach. And then slice up your favorite fruit, I'm choosing a nectarine today. Then sprinkle on some cinnamon and fold your sandwich over. Next, put it on the grill or the stovetop, whatever you want, and let it do its magic. This will make your sandwich so crunchy and good.

timestamps.text: It's time to step up your PB&J game, and this is how to do it.
Take two slices of your favorite bread, I'm using baguette.
Spread some nut butter on it, I chose almond.
Add your jelly, I'm using peach.
And then slice up your favorite fruit, I'm choosing a nectarine today.
Then sprinkle on some cinnamon and fold your sandwich over.
Next, put it on the grill or the stovetop, whatever you want, and let it do its magic.
This will make your sandwich so crunchy and good.
